response.overview: It contains: a polo match; the presentation of the Curtiss airplane to President Leguía by the workers of Morococha; the President responding in a speech to the gift from the workers of Morococha; the arrival of the airplane and the presentation of the pilot and the mechanic; the accident; the pilot after the accident; a football match between Lima Association and Chávez of Callao; at the racetrack on May 23.
response.title: Revista semanal de Inca Film 5
